feature: Close the MAPE-K loop: propose_strategic + judge + act + K phase
description: Implements the PLAN, EXECUTE, and KNOWLEDGE phases of the self-improvement loop. Discover (the A phase) already works and emits 72 hypotheses per tick today, all from AdrDoctor. After this lands, every hypothesis flows: propose 3 variants at T2.5 → score on 5-axis rubric → apply winner via shadow-promotion → write event row → judge consults history. End-to-end smoke test verifies the operator-asks-nothing loop closes on a synthetic hypothesis.

tasks.name: Implement propose_strategic() in adversarial_swarm.rs
tasks.done_condition: fn propose_strategic accepts a Hypothesis and returns Vec<ProposedVariant> of length 3. Each variant has a distinct strategy_label (conservative|aggressive|targeted) and includes a serializable patch payload. unimplemented!() removed.

tasks.name: Export propose_strategic + add public dispatch entry point
tasks.done_condition: orchestration/mod.rs re-exports propose_strategic. New pub fn dispatch_propose_for_hypothesis(h: Hypothesis) lives in a new adversarial_dispatch.rs (NOT in sched.rs — that file is on the SafeFileWriter protected list). The dispatch fn handles inference + STDB writes; sched.rs only needs a one-line call (P1.4).
tasks.verify: hex sched improver discover --once --apply writes >= 3 proposed_action rows per hypothesis

tasks.name: Variant prompt templates
tasks.done_condition: Each strategy template is < 800 tokens, lists the file-count cap, and instructs the model to emit a strict JSON envelope { files_touched: [path], diff: string, rationale: string }. Embedded via rust-embed.

tasks.name: Implement axis scorers
tasks.done_condition: Five pure functions score_alignment, score_blast_radius, score_dependency_satisfaction, score_reversibility, score_historical_reject_rate. Each returns f64 in [0.0, 1.0]. No LLM calls.
tasks.verify: cargo test -p hex-nexus --lib orchestration::improver_judge::tests:: — at least one positive + one negative case per axis

tasks.name: Weighted aggregate + tie-breaker
tasks.done_condition: fn judge(&[ProposedVariant], weights: &Weights) -> JudgeVerdict returns the winning variant_id + per-axis breakdown. Ties resolved in favor of strategy=targeted.

tasks.name: Operator-tunable weights
tasks.done_condition: Weights load from .hex/improver-weights.toml at sched daemon start. Missing file -> hardcoded defaults. Reload on SIGHUP. CLI: hex sched improver weights show.
tasks.verify: hex sched improver weights show prints the current 5-axis values

phases.name: Act — shadow-promotion of the winning variant

tasks.name: Branch + apply patch
tasks.done_condition: fn act(verdict: JudgeVerdict) creates worktree sched/improver/<hyp_id>, applies the variant's diff via git apply, commits with subject 'chore(improver): <hyp_id> <variant_id>'. Returns Result<ActedBranch, ActError>.
tasks.verify: cargo test -p hex-nexus --test improver_act_e2e — uses tempfile + git2 to assert branch + commit exist

tasks.name: Tier-A auto-merge gate
tasks.done_condition: If hypothesis.tier == A, hex worktree merge fast-forwards to main. Tier B writes to docs/workplans/drafts/ + inbox P2. Tier C writes inbox P1, no branch action.

tasks.name: Archive losing variants
tasks.done_condition: Non-winning variants serialize to docs/workplans/rejected/<hyp_id>-<variant_id>.json with judge scores included for audit. Path is git-tracked.
tasks.verify: after end-to-end smoke run (P5), docs/workplans/rejected/ contains 2 rows per hypothesis

tasks.name: improver_event STDB schema + reducer
tasks.done_condition: Table improver_event { id: u64, hyp_id: String, phase: String, variant_id: Option<String>, score: Option<f64>, action: Option<String>, verdict: String, ts: Timestamp }. Reducer improver_event_record(...) appends; never updates.
tasks.verify: spacetime sql --query 'SELECT count(*) FROM improver_event' returns ≥ 0 after WASM publish

tasks.name: Phase transitions write events
tasks.done_condition: Each of propose / judge / act calls improver_event_record at completion with the appropriate phase string. Failure-path is also recorded with verdict=error.
tasks.verify: after one hypothesis goes through all 3 phases, improver_event has ≥ 3 rows for that hyp_id

tasks.name: hex sched scores reads improver_event
tasks.done_condition: hex sched scores groups improver_event by (source, scope), computes accept_rate = applied / (applied + rejected), and prints a table. Replaces the 'No scores yet' stub.
tasks.verify: after end-to-end smoke, hex sched scores returns at least one row

phases.name: End-to-end smoke — close the loop on a synthetic hypothesis

tasks.name: Synthetic hypothesis fixture
tasks.done_condition: Fixture ADR with status=Draft (non-canonical) so AdrDoctor emits a real hypothesis at hex-cli/tests/fixtures/improver/. Used by the e2e test below.

tasks.name: E2E test: discover → propose → judge → act → events
tasks.done_condition: Test boots in-process nexus + stub LLM (canned variants), feeds the synthetic ADR, asserts: (a) one proposed_action with 3 variants, (b) one judge_verdict row, (c) one acted_branch with the expected commit, (d) ≥ 3 improver_event rows. Runtime < 30s.

tasks.name: Documentation + dashboard surface
tasks.done_condition: SELF-IMPROVEMENT.md updated with the now-shipped 5-phase flow + a worked example from P5.2. Improver dashboard view shows per-hypothesis lifecycle (proposed/judged/acted/applied) via STDB subscription.
tasks.verify: dashboard hashroute #/improver renders ≥ 1 row from the smoke test
